message:
test(core): pre-cancelled Cx pool tests for get_lines, write_to_pane, and send_paste

Three new MuxPool tests verify that operations with a pre-cancelled Cx
fail fast with PoolError::Cancelled without attempting any connection:

- pool_get_lines_with_precancelled_cx_returns_pool_cancelled_without_connecting
- pool_write_to_pane_with_precancelled_cx_returns_pool_cancelled_without_connecting
- pool_send_paste_with_precancelled_cx_returns_pool_cancelled_without_connecting

Each test creates a pre-cancelled Cx (zero poll quota + explicit cancel),
invokes the _with_cx variant, and asserts:
- Error is PoolError::Cancelled
- Zero connections created/failed
- Zero acquires/timeouts
- Zero recovery attempts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
